content:
**::AJP.MECA.ARTS**
- Legal and structural backbone
- Think: Lucasfilm x MIT Media Lab x Byzantine monastery
- Houses all operational + IP functions
- Business filings
- Copyright/ownership
- Monetization and licensing
- Narrative governance

---

### III. Primary Branches (Children of 4_bl00m)

Each avatar fulfills a domain of interest, medium, and audience.

| AVATAR / NODE | DOMAIN(S) | FORMAT | FUNCTION |
|----------------------|---------------------------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| ::MET4morfoses (M4) | Myth, Religion, Narrative | Text → Software → AR | Speculative cosmology + myth engine |
| ::Q_v33R | Queer Theory, Memory | Podcast, Video Essay, Essay | Real-life reflection + queer storytelling |
